About.Name: Sophie R Hanay
About.Currently: Computer Science and Electrical Engineering Student
About.AboutText: Hi, I am Sophie Hanay. I am a passionate computer science and electrical engineering student with a keen interest in software development and programming. Currently, I am pursuing my undergraduate degree at Seattle Pacific University. I am dedicated to expanding my knowledge and skills in various areas of engineering.

Project1.Title: Sallen Key Bandpass Filter
Project1.Desc:
For this project, I built 2 stages to successfully pass 10kHz. My Q value was the same for both stages, being 3.9. The gain for the first stage of the filter was 5.56dB, the second stage was 5.56dB, and the total gain for the two together was 11.41dB.

It has a GitHub repo and more details shown in screenshots.
